title: VCD dump contents incorrect with --timing coroutines

features.name: always block with sequential delay statements
features.description: Code should include an always block with multiple #delay statements that create timing coroutines

features.name: multiple sequential assignments in delayed always block
features.description: Code should include four or more signal assignments sequentially placed before a delay in an always block

features.name: vcd tracing with timing coroutines
features.description: Code should include $dumpvars for VCD tracing enabled with timing-sensitive coroutine code

features.name: localparam timing constants with delay-driven always block
features.description: Code should include localparam constants used in delay expressions within an always block containing multiple assignments
